Prof. Dr. Assist. Project Support to Dr. Emre Ozan Polat within the scope of HORIZON 2020 ERA-NET CHIST-ERA

Dr. Emre Ozan Polat’s project titled “Wearable Nano Opto Electro-Mechanical Systems” from our Department of Mechatronics Engineering, Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences. Prof. Emre Ozan Polat’s project titled “Wearable Nano Opto Electro-Mechanical Systems” has been entitled to be supported within the scope of CHIST-ERA IV ERA-NET.

ERA-Net Program is a Horizon 2020 -Future and Emerging Technologie -NET Cofund project.

The “Wearable Nano Opto Electro-Mechanical Systems” project envisions a radically new technology that will enable non-invasive and real-time monitoring of physiological parameters.

We congratulate Emre Ozan and wish him success in his research.
